jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - InfraMantra - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
InfraMantra, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About InfraMantra:
InfraMantra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with InfraMantra!
